scope_refinement:
TrueScan was originally scoped as a multimodal (visual + audio) deepfake
detection system. During Phase 3 the active project team changed from
three members to two. To preserve implementation depth, reproducibility,
and evaluation rigor for the remaining two members, we refined the scope
to image-level visual deepfake detection only. Audio detection (ASVspoof,
WaveFake, AASIST, LFCC features) and video-level temporal aggregation
are deferred to future work.
future_work: multimodal fusion of audio and visual signals

mitigations: checkpoint to Drive after every epoch
auto-resume from the latest checkpoint at startup
top-K=3 snapshot retention so we keep usable weights even on truncation

risks.risk: MTCNN face-detection failures bias the training set
mitigations: track success rate per split x label and report it
center-crop fallback when no face detected (logged, not discarded)
lower confidence threshold from 0.90 to 0.85 if any class shows >10% failure

risks.risk: Overfitting to FF++ c23 compression artifacts (poor Celeb-DF generalization)
mitigations: JPEG augmentation across q in {30..95}
Mixup / CutMix and stochastic erasing
auxiliary DCT branch to make the model less reliant on RGB compression cues
mandatory zero-shot Celeb-DF evaluation in section 14

risks.risk: Severe class imbalance (4:1 fake:real on FF++) inflates accuracy
mitigations: WeightedRandomSampler + Focal Loss + class-weighted BCE
never report accuracy alone; always report AUROC, F1, balanced accuracy, PR-AUC
curated 1000-video subset (200 real + 800 manipulated)
mixed precision and 224x224 input
two-stage fine-tuning to converge fast
FAST_DEV_RUN switch to validate the pipeline before the full run

risks.risk: Temperature scaling fails on overconfident logits
mitigations: label smoothing reduces source overconfidence
separate calibration split (10% of val) prevents leakage
reliability diagram is a required artifact in section 16

risks.risk: Identity leakage across splits inflates test metrics
risks.likelihood: low if enforced; high if not
mitigations: parent_id-level split + explicit assertion in section 5
Celeb-DF treated as fully external
extract frames + crops to /content (local SSD)
persist checkpoints to Drive only at epoch boundaries
num_workers > 0 + pin_memory=True
